reviews.comment:
Cartel de "forme fila" poco fácil de distinguir. El playero tiene que estar indicándoles a cada uno (que no es de la zona) que dé la vuelta y forme fila junto al cordón.

(Translated by Google)
The "form a line" sign is hard to spot. The beach attendant has to be directing everyone (who isn't from the area) to turn around and form a line along the curb.
